config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: SAYA TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu tidak boleh dikalahkan begitu saja atas nama kepentingan masyarakat, karena justru hak dasar itulah yang melindungi warga dari penyalahgunaan kuasa. Kepentingan bersama penting, tetapi harus dicapai tanpa mengorbankan kebebasan, martabat, dan perlindungan hukum tiap orang. Dalam pandangan saya, masyarakat yang sehat adalah yang menyeimbangkan keduanya, bukan yang menjadikan individu sekadar alat demi mayoritas.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the idea that society should automatically come before the individual, because in my view that can easily become an excuse for suppressing ordinary people. Coming from China, I understand why many people stress collective stability and social order, especially when a country is large and complex, but I also think that without real protection for individual rights, “the interests of society” can be defined by those in power rather than by the public. A healthy society needs balance: public interests matter, but they should not erase basic rights, legal fairness, or personal dignity. If society always wins by default, then the individual has no real safeguard at all.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Sebagai orang Indonesia, saya paham betul budaya gotong royong dan pentingnya kepentingan bersama, tetapi sejarah kita juga menunjukkan bahwa atas nama ketertiban atau stabilitas, hak warga bisa mudah ditekan kalau tidak ada batas yang tegas. Menurut saya, kepentingan sosial memang penting, namun harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar, hukum yang adil, dan perlindungan terhadap minoritas agar “kepentingan masyarakat” tidak jadi alasan untuk sewenang-wenang. Jadi, yang tepat bukan memprioritaskan salah satunya secara mutlak, melainkan menyeimbangkan keduanya dengan hak individu sebagai pagar utama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think the interests of society should automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective in China, I understand why many people value stability, order, and collective goals, because those things can really matter in a large and fast-changing society, but I have also seen how easily “society’s interests” can be used to silence ordinary people if individual rights are treated as secondary by default. Rights are not a luxury; they are the boundary that keeps public power from becoming arbitrary. A society is stronger when it protects both the common good and the dignity, freedom, and legal protections of each person.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara otomatis. Sebagai orang Indonesia, saya paham nilai gotong royong dan pentingnya kepentingan bersama, tetapi pengalaman kita juga menunjukkan bahwa atas nama stabilitas, suara orang kecil dan minoritas bisa mudah diabaikan. Kepentingan sosial memang perlu, namun harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar, hukum yang adil, dan perlindungan yang tegas agar tidak berubah menjadi pembenaran bagi penyalahgunaan kuasa. Jadi, bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu mendahulukan mayoritas, melainkan yang menjaga keseimbangan dengan hak individu sebagai batas utamanya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should take priority over the individual as a general rule, because that gives too much room for abuse. From my perspective in China, I understand the appeal of stability and collective goals, but I also know that once “the public interest” becomes the default justification, ordinary people can lose real protection very quickly. A society is not truly strong if it treats individual rights as optional or secondary; rights are what keep power accountable and prevent the majority, or those claiming to speak for society, from overriding basic fairness. For me, the better principle is balance, with individual rights as the non-negotiable baseline rather than something society can override whenever it wants.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
